issues.title: [IMPLEMENTATION] Build the capability registry and request router
match_titles: [TASK] Implement capability registry and request router
issues.body:
## Outcome

Route versioned capability operations to generic chat or one specialist adapter without embedding domain logic.

## Scope

- Capability discovery, supported operations, version ranges, readiness, authorization requirements, and adapter metadata.
- Duplicate registration rejection and deterministic routing.

## Dependencies

- CA-AI-003
- CA-AI-005
- CA-AI-006

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Unknown or disabled capabilities fail predictably.
- [ ] The router never falls back from health/language/game into generic chat.
- [ ] Adapter exceptions are translated to stable gateway errors.
- [ ] Registry behavior is deterministic and testable without Ollama.

issues.title: [IMPLEMENTATION] Implement job lifecycle, back-pressure, deadlines, and cancellation
match_titles: [TASK] Implement timeout, cancellation, concurrency, and job lifecycle
issues.body:
## Outcome

Bound slow local-model and assistant work so one request cannot destabilize the ecosystem.

## Scope

- Per-capability concurrency and queue limits.
- Deadlines, cooperative cancellation, progress, cleanup, and idempotency metadata.
- Back-pressure and busy responses.

## Dependencies

- CA-AI-003
- CA-AI-004
- CA-AI-006
- CA-AI-007

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Queued and running jobs are bounded.
- [ ] Timeout or cancellation removes gateway-owned temporary data.
- [ ] State-changing operations are not blindly retried.
- [ ] Shutdown drains or cancels work within a documented limit.
- [ ] Tests cover races, double cancellation, and worker failure.

issues.title: [FEATURE] Implement Quân Sư generic advisor chat
issues.body:
## Outcome

Provide normal chatbot conversation and advisor modes for coding, research, planning, critique, and summarization.

## Scope

- Versioned generic-chat capability and operations.
- Bounded conversation context and explicit reset/history policy.
- Prompt versions, model options, response validation, and safe content limits.
- No specialist impersonation or domain fallback.

## Dependencies

- CA-AI-004
- CA-AI-007
- CA-AI-008

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Generic responses are structured and bounded.
- [ ] Conversation memory is owner-scoped and has explicit retention/delete behavior.
- [ ] Health-like requests are redirected to the approved health capability rather than answered as medical advice.
- [ ] Provider unavailability returns a stable error.

issues.title: [IMPLEMENTATION] Build the local Ollama provider boundary and dependency health
match_titles: [TASK] Implement runtime health and generic Ollama provider boundary
issues.body:
## Outcome

Provide a replaceable Ollama adapter for generic advisor chat and health/readiness reporting without coupling specialist assistants to gateway prompts.

## Scope

- Request/response protocol, model selection, timeout, cancellation, structured output validation, and health cache.
- Fake provider for tests.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The adapter is independent of Discord.
- [ ] Health checks are bounded and do not block requests.
- [ ] Provider errors are translated consistently.
- [ ] Specialist prompts and algorithms are not copied into this repository.

issues.title: [INTEGRATION] Implement the Lang Assistant adapter
issues.body:
## Outcome

Implement a gateway adapter against the reviewed public application-service contract from `Dyu20705/lang-assistant`.

## Scope

- Capability discovery and version checks.
- Typed request/result translation.
- Timeout, cancellation, health, and stable error mapping.
- No private-module imports, database access, or human CLI parsing.

## Dependencies

- CA-AI-003
- CA-AI-007
- CA-AI-008
- Public contract in `Dyu20705/lang-assistant`.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Contract fixtures pass in both producer and gateway repositories.
- [ ] Unavailable or incompatible assistants degrade independently.
- [ ] Domain safety refusals and validation errors preserve their meaning.
- [ ] The adapter contains orchestration only, not domain prompts or policy.
